user.title: Voitas Wallbox
user.description: Enter the IP address of your Voitas Wallbox. Make sure it's on the same network as Home Assistant.

power.title: Charging Power Source
power.description: Choose how charging power is determined. This is used to calculate energy (kWh).

error.cannot_connect: Could not receive data from the Wallbox. Make sure the IP is correct and the device is on.
